hooks.name: Auto-update Docs
hooks.description: When dependency-related files, build pipeline, or tech stack are modified, remind the agent to update the corresponding documentation (dependency chart, release notes, build pipeline page).

action.prompt: A file related to dependencies, build pipeline, tech stack, or database was modified. Check if any of these need updating: 1) Dependency chart (/admin/dependencies) if a new reward chain or event was added. 2) BuildPipeline.xml if pipeline steps changed. 3) Release notes if this is part of a new feature. 4) Environments steering doc if database config changed. 5) Apply new migrations to all 3 environments (dev, staging, live). 6) If new database tables or hooks were added/modified, update the backend documentation page and add the relevant new item to the databases (all 3 environments). Only update if the change warrants it — don't update for minor tweaks.
